title: Hawks flush out allegedly corrupt Bitou traffic official
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A senior clerk at the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A senior clerk at the Bitou municipality motor registration section was arrested and now faces fraud and corruption charges following a sting operation by the Hawks on Friday, 26 April.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A senior clerk at the Bitou municipality motor registration section was arrested and now faces fraud and corruption charges following a sting operation by the Hawks on Friday, 26 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lungiswa Klaas, 43, appeared in the Plettenberg Bay magistrate’s court on Monday 29 April and was released on bail of R5 000.","html":"Lungiswa Klaas, 43, appeared in the Plettenberg Bay magistrate’s court on Monday 29 April and was released on bail of R5 000."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She allegedly issued a roadworthy certificate at the vehicle testing station in Plettenberg Bay without a roadworthy test being done."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She will appear in court again on 6 June.","html":"She will appear in court again on 6 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hawks flush out allegedly corrupt Bitou traffic official
